articles.description:

articles.title: How did the 1994 World Cup go for Boston and Foxborough, and how does it compare with 2026?
articles.description:
Despite some recognizable problems — local organizers initially struggled to raise money, hotel bookings lagged, and certain ticket costs soared — the tournament won over some of its sharpest critics, including Boston Globe columnist Bob Ryan.

articles.title: Where did Sandwich, Mass. get its name?
articles.description:

articles.title: MBTA announces new ferry service starting in June that will loop around Boston Harbor
articles.description:
